channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hurricane Milton's impending arrival causes Tropicana Field to transform into base camp for Florida workers
item.description: Tropicana Field transformed into a base camp for Florida emergency crews as Hurricane Milton roared toward Florida's western coast on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Pete Alonso's power surge helps propel Mets to NLDS Game 3 win over Phillies
item.description: Pete Alonso helped the New York Mets to a 7-2 victory thanks to his home run that gave the team some comfort room against the Philadelphia Phillies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Phillies one defeat from elimination after 7-2 loss to Mets in Game 3 of NLDS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Night vision view from helicopter gives wild perspective of viral Vanderbilt celebration with goalpost
item.description: The party was on in Nashville after unranked Vanderbilt defeated No. 1 Alabama on Saturday night, and night vision from a helicopter above caught it all.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lynx return to finals with 88-77 win over Sun in Game 5 behind Collier's 27 points, 11 rebounds
item.description: Napheesa Collier had 27 points and 11 rebounds and Courtney Williams contributed 24 points and both-ends-of-the-court energy to lead the Minnesota Lynx past the Connecticut Sun 88-77 and into the WNBA Finals for the first time in seven years.
item.dc:creator: Dave Campbell, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Jerry Jones and Roger Penske partner to give IndyCar a brand new street racing spectacle
item.description: When IndyCar approached the Dallas Cowboys about potentially hosting a street course race in Texas, Jerry Jones saw that Roger Penske was involved and had no hesitation in striking a deal.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia WR Colbie Young arrested on charges of battery and assault on an unborn child
item.description: Georgia wide receiver Colbie Young was arrested Tuesday on charges of battery and assault on an unborn child. Athens-Clarke County jail records show Young was booked at 4:18 a.m. on the misdemeanor charges.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Grimace takes the 7 train to the Mets game
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – Like many other Mets fans, Grimace took the No. 7 train to the Mets game at Citi Field Tuesday. The Amazins sold out Citi Field for Game 3 of the National League Division Series against the Phillies. Given the crowd, fans were encouraged to take public transit to the game.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Padres return to Petco Park in NLDS: What to know before you go
item.description: San Diego Padres fans are ecstatic to welcome back their team to Petco Park for games three and four of the National League Division Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 on Sunday night to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Jets' Aaron Rodgers becomes the 9th NFL player to throw for 60,000 yards
item.description: Aaron Rodgers reached another milestone in his stellar career on Sunday by becoming just the ninth player in NFL history to throw for 60,000 yards in regular-season games.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Baseball fans discuss Dodgers’ chances in NLDS Game 2 over donuts
item.description: After a rollercoaster of emotions in Game 1 of the National League Divisional Series, baseball lovers were up early getting donuts in Inglewood and eager to share their thoughts with the news on Sunday's matchup between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Dodgers' Kershaw, Guardians' Lively, Tigers' Mize and Yankees' Stroman are left off ALDS rosters
item.description: Pitchers Clayton Kershaw and Joe Kelly were left off the Los Angeles Dodgers' roster for their NL Division Series against the San Diego Padres that started Saturday. San Diego added right-handers Martín Pérez and Alek Jacob, who were skipped from the Wild Card Series roster against Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James reveals why he joined the Lakers
item.description: The NBA season is right around the corner, but the league's oldest player still had some time on his hands on Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Padres restricting Dodgers fans from buying NLDS tickets in San Diego
item.description: There's a controversy brewing over tickets for the 2024 MLB playoffs. The San Diego Padres are restricting Los Angeles Dodgers fans from buying NLDS tickets for the games in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Lewis, KTLA 5

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Viral disease outbreak leads to several horses being euthanized at Los Alamitos
item.description: An outbreak of a potentially fatal viral disease at Los Alamitos Race Course has led to seven race horses being euthanized, officials have confirmed. Announced in an advisory on Thursday, the California Horse Racing Board said it was notified of an outbreak of Equine Infectious Anemia on Sept.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Is the Chicago Bears run game back?
item.description: The Chicago Bears are relying on their running game and short passing game to replicate their Week 4 performance against the Carolina Panthers, as they have shifted away from a run-dominant offense under their new offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: How two Central football players are working to get recruited
item.description: A pair of local high school football stars -- Central High School's Jaime Padilla and Antonio Reyes -- are doing everything they can, even traveling the country to show college football programs what they can do.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Padres beat Braves to advance to NLDS
item.description: The Padres booked their ticket to the National League Division Series on Wednesday, defeating the Atlanta Braves 5-4 in Game 2 of the Wild Card Series at Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: NCAA March Madness returning to San Francisco
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- March Madness is returning to San Francisco, to Chase Center, specifically. On Wednesday, the NCAA announced that SF's Chase Center will host the 2028 Division I Men's Basketball West Regionals. The West Coast Conference will serve as the host.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4
